policy.known: all known train/test/arc-gen; default/disable-all x threads1/4; candidate and authority correct; raw/sign equal; errors/nonfinite zero
policy.runtime_shape: strict inferred declaration checked against every node output on the first legal known input
policy.fresh: two independent >=1500-case seeds only after all pre-gates; >=90% each; private/monitor additionally needs authority all-input pass-through closure

formal_semantics.semantic_statement: CastLike(x, fixed witness) casts x to witness element type; Cast(x,to=witness_dtype) has the same numeric conversion. Saturate only affects float8-like targets and is irrelevant for this target.
